title: Status plugin auth definition (auth.json)
description: Declares how the plugin authenticates. The app renders the setup form from `fields` and stores secrets in Keychain. Plugins never access Keychain directly.

type.description: Auth mechanism. `oauth2` is accepted by this schema but deferred for v1 pending the auth decision in docs/07-security-privacy.md.

fields.description: Credential fields the user must provide during setup.

type.description: How the app renders and stores the field. `secret` and `secret-file` values go to Keychain.

help.description: Short help text shown under the field.
